name: vibeguard
description: Codex App plugin for VibeGuard observability, hook health, setup checks, and local dashboards.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect VibeGuard hook health and setup state
interface.longDescription: VibeGuard gives Codex an observability-first entrypoint for local hook health, trigger stats, setup diagnosis, metrics export, and explicit hook installation. It generates local dashboard artifacts from existing VibeGuard evidence without silently modifying global configuration during plugin discovery.
